'''hafuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbagehead|cabbagehead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbagehead|cabbagehead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hafuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæfiyith|hæfiyith]] || [[word:hæfiyij|hæfiyij]] || [[word:hæfiyish|hæfiyish]] || [[word:hæfiyi|hæfiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafufuyuth|hafufuyuth]] || [[word:hafufuyuj|hafufuyuj]] || [[word:hafufuyush|hafufuyush]] || [[word:hafufuyu|hafufuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafuyuth|hafuyuth]] || [[word:hafuyuj|hafuyuj]] || [[word:hafuyush|hafuyush]] || [[word:hafuyu|hafuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafufyuth|hafufyuth]] || [[word:hafufyuj|hafufyuj]] || [[word:hafufyush|hafufyush]] || [[word:hafufyuf|hafufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hafuyuthu|hafuyuthu]] || [[word:hafuyuju|hafuyuju]] || [[word:hafuyushu|hafuyushu]] || [[word:hafuyuku|hafuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hafuyuth|hafuyuth]] || [[word:hafuyuj|hafuyuj]] || [[word:hafuyush|hafuyush]] || [[word:hafuyu|hafuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hafuyuthul|hafuyuthul]] || [[word:hafuyujul|hafuyujul]] || [[word:hafuyushul|hafuyushul]] || [[word:hafuyukul|hafuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hafuyuthuthu|hafuyuthuthu]] || [[word:hafuyujuju|hafuyujuju]] || [[word:hafuyushushu|hafuyushushu]] || [[word:hafuyuku|hafuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hafuyuthun|hafuyuthun]] || [[word:hafuyujun|hafuyujun]] || [[word:hafuyushun|hafuyushun]] || [[word:hafuyukun|hafuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hafuyuthuoro|hafuyuthuoro]] || [[word:hafuyujuoro|hafuyujuoro]] || [[word:hafuyushuoro|hafuyushuoro]] || [[word:hafuyukuoro|hafuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
